channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the Endangered Species Act, the Trump administration may limit how wildlife is protected in the United States. Environmental groups are suing. n.pr/4wCwMd9
item.content:encoded: By altering the definition of the word "harm" as used by the Endangered Species Act, the Trump administration may limit how wildlife is protected in the United States. Environmental groups are suing. n.pr/4wCwMd9

item.content:encoded: Listen to Brighton indie rockers Penelope Isles' wooly, expansive new tune "I Loved You, Robert Pattinson"

item.title: Check out Deep Sea Diver's cool new indie rock cover of Mass…

item.description: Check out Deep Sea Diver's cool new indie rock cover of Massive Attack's masterpiece "Teardrop"

item.title: Album of the Day: Violet Cowboy, "Ramraid at the Wiggly Worm…
item.author: Bandcamp (@bandcamp.com)
item.description: Album of the Day: Violet Cowboy, "Ramraid at the Wiggly Worm." A musical thought process that feels glitchy, crackly, and Radiophonic, rumbling occasionally into the hinterlands of Aphex Twin.
item.content:encoded: Album of the Day: Violet Cowboy, "Ramraid at the Wiggly Worm." A musical thought process that feels glitchy, crackly, and Radiophonic, rumbling occasionally into the hinterlands of Aphex Twin.

item.title: The Philadelphia songwriter continues to refine his pen on t…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Philadelphia songwriter continues to refine his pen on the follow-up to his breakthrough self-titled album from 2023. n.pr/4w5eJN9

item.title: Annual inflation hit 3.5% in June, down from May's more than…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Annual inflation hit 3.5% in June, down from May's more than three-year high — but the resumption of the conflict with Iran threaten to push up inflation as energy costs once again spike. n.pr/4ppzdxA
item.content:encoded: Annual inflation hit 3.5% in June, down from May's more than three-year high — but the resumption of the conflict with Iran threaten to push up inflation as energy costs once again spike. n.pr/4ppzdxA

item.title: The visa process for visiting artists has always been compli…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)

item.title: We're at the final stretch of the World Cup. It feels like j…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: We're at the final stretch of the World Cup. It feels like just yesterday, international fans were arriving in the U.S. and marveling at Buc-ee's and unlimited free soda. n.pr/4vtUSWM
item.content:encoded: We're at the final stretch of the World Cup. It feels like just yesterday, international fans were arriving in the U.S. and marveling at Buc-ee's and unlimited free soda. n.pr/4vtUSWM

item.title: The United States plans to reinstate a blockade over the Str…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The United States plans to reinstate a blockade over the Strait of Hormuz today. And, several states are suing to stop the massive Paramount-Warner Bros. merger. n.pr/3T2trFR
item.content:encoded: The United States plans to reinstate a blockade over the Strait of Hormuz today. And, several states are suing to stop the massive Paramount-Warner Bros. merger. n.pr/3T2trFR

item.title: The governor said her order pauses state environmental permi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The governor said her order pauses state environmental permits for one year in order to build a regulatory framework that protects the environment and ratepayers (via WXXI).
item.content:encoded: The governor said her order pauses state environmental permits for one year in order to build a regulatory framework that protects the environment and ratepayers (via WXXI).

item.title: It comes as part of a £45 million initiative which will back…
item.author: Mixmag (@mixmag.net)
item.description: It comes as part of a £45 million initiative which will back "thousands of grassroots projects, over 40,000 artists and businesses, and millions of children to secure a thriving music industry"
item.content:encoded: It comes as part of a £45 million initiative which will back "thousands of grassroots projects, over 40,000 artists and businesses, and millions of children to secure a thriving music industry"

item.title: Beef prices are continuing to rise due to drought, low herd …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Beef prices are continuing to rise due to drought, low herd sizes and concerns about the new world screwworm in the United States, but business owners in Texas say that raising prices could drive away customers. n.pr/4aQuj6y
item.content:encoded: Beef prices are continuing to rise due to drought, low herd sizes and concerns about the new world screwworm in the United States, but business owners in Texas say that raising prices could drive away customers. n.pr/4aQuj6y
